ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" INTEGER /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is intended for (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category FOREIGN KEY ("product_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the product (e.g., 6, 8, 10) */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "hem" REAL /* Hem measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder_to_shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder to shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for the measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., chest, hem, length) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., front, back, side) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for the size */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the product (e.g., 6, 8, 10) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size available */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for the inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size for the inventory entry */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product and size in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for the item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size for the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product and size ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
